hooks.name: oak-ci-context
hooks.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook SessionStart --agent gemini || true

hooks.name: oak-ci-prompt
hooks.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook BeforeAgent --agent gemini || true

hooks.name: oak-ci-observe
hooks.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook PostToolUse --agent gemini || true

hooks.name: oak-ci-stop
hooks.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook AfterAgent --agent gemini || true

hooks.name: oak-ci-pre-compact
hooks.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook PreCompress --agent gemini || true

hooks.name: oak-ci-session-end
hooks.command: command -v oak-dev >/dev/null 2>&1 && oak-dev ci hook SessionEnd --agent gemini || true
